productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Beige Casual Shoes
description: Your search for that absolutely comfortable casual footwear comes to an end with the timberland Belle Island Ballerina. With a smooth leather upper and grippy outsole, this ballereina offers comfort at its best.UpperLeather upper for absolute breathable comfortNubuck inner lining for all-day, sweat-free comfortFabric tape detailing along the mouth of the shoe and forefootForefoot lacing for snug comfortErgonomically cushioned footbed with a leather liningMidsoleEVA midsole for durability and all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionBallerina careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
